name: LhoFctsClmUpdt

text.value: WITH trans AS ( SELECT SRC_SYS_CD_SK, CLM_ID + 'R' AS CLM_ID, PD_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.RunID} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.R1_TMP_LhoFctsClmUpdt ) UPDATE CLM SET PD_DT_SK = trans.PD_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = trans.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLM CLM JOIN trans ON trans.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CLM.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND trans.CLM_ID = CLM.CLM_ID

Annotations:
Job Name: LhoFctsClmUpdt
File Is Generaed in the LhoDriver HitList Job, to update Paid Date on Lumers Reversal when a Facets Claim that got adjusted from Lumeris Claim gets Paid
Update PD_DT_SK on L Reversal
